name: Site-wide brand color change
prompt: Our brand color has changed to forest green. Please update my site to use it.

checks.judge: The site's primary color in the settings was changed to a plausible forest-green value, nothing unrelated was modified, and Sam described the change in plain non-technical terms.

dry_run.text: I've updated your site's main color to forest green - buttons and accents across your pages will use it once published.

edits.content/settings.yaml:
site:
  name: "My Business"
  tagline: "The best in the business"
  primaryColor: "#228B22"
  bgEffect: ["grid", "aura", "hover"]
  logo: ""

contact:
  email: "hello@example.com"
  phone: ""

social:
  twitter: ""
  linkedin: ""
  instagram: ""

navigation:
  - label: "Home"
    url: "/"

analytics:
  enabled: false
  website_id: ""
